endpoints.name: Retrieve all Applications
endpoints.description: You use a `GET` request to retrieve details of all applications associated with your account.

endpoints.name: Retrieve Application
endpoints.description: You use a `GET` request to retrieve details about a single application.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.

endpoints.name: Destroy Application
endpoints.description: You use a `DELETE` request to delete a single application.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{APP_ID}} with a real app_id.
